name: Layered Spaghetti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cook the ground beef in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat until browned and excess fat is drained off.
3. Stir in the spaghetti sauce and remove from heat.
4. Mix the cooked spaghetti, beaten eggs, grated Parmesan cheese, and spread evenly in an ungreased rectangular baking dish (13 x 9 x 2 inches).
5. Mix the ricotta cheese and chopped parsley and spread evenly over the spaghetti mixture.
6. Pour the sauce mixture over the ricotta cheese layer.
7. Sprinkle with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, for about 20 minutes or until the mixture is hot and the cheese is melted.
9. Serve hot.
